# Guarantee Tactics Index

| Tactic | When to use | Primary metric |
|---|---|---|
| [High-intent problem search](./001_high_intent_problem_search.md) | Use when buyers search for the exact pain. | CTR, engaged sessions, demo views, trial starts. |
| [Competitor alternative intercept](./002_competitor_alternative_intercept.md) | Use when buyers compare or complain about competitors. | Impression share, CTR, comparison-page engagement, trials. |
| [Integration-specific page](./003_integration_specific_page.md) | Use when product connects to known tools. | Integration page visits, setup starts, activation. |
| [Proof-before-claim ad](./004_proof_before_claim_ad.md) | Use for skeptical buyers. | Video completion, demo clicks, sample uploads. |
| [Risk reversal offer](./005_risk_reversal_offer.md) | Use when fear blocks action. | CTA rate, trial starts, activation, refund rate. |
| [Diagnostic lead magnet](./006_diagnostic_lead_magnet.md) | Use for complex B2B problems. | Completion rate, qualified leads, calls booked. |
| [Founder mechanism post](./007_founder_mechanism_post.md) | Use when category is immature. | Engagement quality, saves, profile visits, retargeting pool. |
| [Hidden cost reveal](./008_hidden_cost_reveal.md) | Use for unaware/problem-aware buyers. | Calculator starts, shares, CTA clicks. |
| [Before-after workflow drama](./009_before_after_workflow_drama.md) | Use for products that compress steps. | Video retention, click-through, demo usage. |
| [Retargeting proof stack](./010_retargeting_proof_stack.md) | Use after visits without conversion. | Return visits, proof engagement, conversions. |
| [Pricing clarity ad](./011_pricing_clarity_ad.md) | Use when buyers fear hidden cost. | Pricing views, qualified leads, close rate. |
| [Objection FAQ campaign](./012_objection_faq_campaign.md) | Use when comments/questions repeat. | FAQ engagement, trial starts, sales objections. |
| [Security trust route](./013_security_trust_route.md) | Use for B2B/enterprise SaaS. | Security page views, enterprise lead quality. |
| [Use-case landing page swarm](./014_use_case_landing_page_swarm.md) | Use when product has many verticals/workflows. | Organic/search traffic, conversion by use case. |
| [Sample-data sandbox](./015_sample_data_sandbox.md) | Use when value can be experienced with fake data. | Sandbox starts, first-value event, activation. |
| [Manual concierge first](./016_manual_concierge_first.md) | Use when automation is not proven yet. | Calls, paid pilots, repeat problems. |
| [Pay-on-success pilot](./017_pay_on_success_pilot.md) | Use for high-trust B2B where value is measurable. | Pilot acceptance, success rate, expansion. |
| [Alternative-to-spreadsheet angle](./018_alternative_to_spreadsheet_angle.md) | Use when current solution is manual. | CTR, demo views, activation. |
| [Category creation thesis](./019_category_creation_thesis.md) | Use when buyers do not know category exists. | Content saves, direct searches, inbound questions. |
| [Review mining ad](./020_review_mining_ad.md) | Use when public reviews reveal pain. | CTR, qualitative resonance, comments. |
| [AI-search answer page](./021_ai_search_answer_page.md) | Use when buyers ask AI/search for recommendations. | Organic impressions, referral mentions, branded search. |
| [Comparison matrix page](./022_comparison_matrix_page.md) | Use for vendor-aware buyers. | Matrix engagement, demo conversions. |
| [Implementation proof ad](./023_implementation_proof_ad.md) | Use for adoption-risk buyers. | Setup guide views, enterprise leads. |
| [Customer-story snippet](./024_customer_story_snippet.md) | Use when independent trust is needed. | CTR, case-study views, lead quality. |
| [Failure-transparent positioning](./025_failure_transparent_positioning.md) | Use for skeptical technical buyers. | Engaged sessions, high-fit conversions. |
| [Urgency from trigger event](./026_urgency_from_trigger_event.md) | Use when external events create need. | CTR, conversion velocity. |
| [Workflow template offer](./027_workflow_template_offer.md) | Use when buyer wants implementation help. | Template downloads, product signups. |
| [ROI calculator](./028_roi_calculator.md) | Use when economic buyer is involved. | Calculator completions, sales-qualified leads. |
| [Creator-style demo video](./029_creator_style_demo_video.md) | Use on social platforms. | Thumbstop, video completion, clicks. |
| [Negative positioning](./030_negative_positioning.md) | Use in crowded categories. | Lead quality, sales efficiency. |
